title: error when using the substring function.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE SampleTable(ID SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, Name VARCHAR(50), DateField DATE, Amount NUMERIC(10, 2));
INSERT INTO SampleTable (Name, DateField, Amount) VALUES ('Test Entry 1', '2023-01-01', 150.50);
INSERT INTO SampleTable (Name, DateField, Amount) VALUES ('Test Entry 2', '2023-02-01', NULL);
INSERT INTO SampleTable (Name, DateField, Amount) VALUES ('Test Entry 3', '2023-03-01', 200.00);
SELECT Name, SUBSTRING(Name FROM 1 FOR 4) AS ShortName, SUM(Amount) AS TotalAmount FROM SampleTable GROUP BY Name, ShortName;
key_bug_features: error using substring function with grouped results
